final_prompt.prompt:
Create a promotional marketing poster for a 跨境电商 campaign.

Style/medium: needs a visually rich, editorial-commercial aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be 16:9 horizontal layout; must include layered typography stacking with product/hero subject physically overlapping and occluding some letterforms
Subject: must include a product or hero subject as the focal element that breaks through the type layers
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs a dynamic, attention-grabbing promotional atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a bold, high-impact direction — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include decorative art-lettering / display type as a primary graphic element (exact copy is yours); must include stacked typographic layers behind and around the subject
Constraints: must preserve visual complexity without chaos — layered but structured; art lettering + stacked type + subject occlusion must all coexist in one coherent composition
Avoid: cluttered or unreadable layouts; flat single-layer compositions
